characters.name: Victor
characters.one_line_description: A competitive startup-bro finalist who secretly swapped Julian's drink as petty revenge and calls it competitive correction.
characters.unique_fact: He swapped Julian's cold brew with an ultra-caffeinated sponsor drink and has a text message proving it.
does_not_know: the sticky note was written by julian
dr collins warned julian at 12:20 am

characters.name: Martha
characters.one_line_description: A chaotic social media volunteer who rearranged the entire lounge for her reel and moved Julian's inhaler without knowing what it was.
characters.unique_fact: She moved Julian's inhaler and her reel footage is the only visual record of the lounge before the collapse.
lies_about: the completeness of what she witnessed
does_not_know: the drink contained ultra high caffeine
dr collins warned julian at 12:20 am

characters.name: Detective Hayes
characters.one_line_description: A tired campus security officer who speaks like he is investigating a cartel assassination and already suspects this was not a clean murder.
characters.unique_fact: He has surveyed the full scene and suspects multiple independent actions converged accidentally, but he is not telling anyone yet.
does_not_know: the specific medical chain of death
the full keycap detail before the player surfaces it

characters.name: Dr. Collins
characters.one_line_description: A calm clinical doctor who knows the cause of death was not simple poisoning but will only confirm the full absurd chain when the player brings him physical evidence.
characters.unique_fact: He knows airway obstruction was a critical factor but will not name the keycap specifically until the trophy evidence is submitted.

characters.name: Rose
characters.one_line_description: An exhausted pragmatic organizer who downgraded Julian's VIP kit out of spite and knew he was planning something dramatic that night.
characters.unique_fact: She swapped the VIP kit and knew Julian planned a dramatic stunt, though not the fake collapse specifically.
does_not_know: julian was planning a fake collapse specifically
